title: Bath Duck Toys 5 Pcs Rubber Duck Family Squeak Ducks Decorations Party Favors Baby Shower Toy for Toddlers Boys Girls
features: 💦【Squeak when pressed】 These cute duckies are smooth and soft. It will make a "BEBE ~" sound when pressed.Your kids Never Stop Playing With Them !
💦【Happy Bath】: Kids just love to play with them in the bathtub! Bring a Great Bath Time with Your Little Ones!

💦【Duck Family Set】The set contains 5 family ducks of the size:4.3''*3.7''*3.5'', 3.2''*2.8''*2.5'',2.4''*2''*1.9'',2.2''*1.9''*1.7'' and 1.9''*1.7''*1.6''. Nice size, with great grip for baby’s little hands!
💦【Safety Material】 This duck is made of healthy PVC material. It is biteable and don't worry that the baby will bite it during the oral period.
💦【Cute Ducky Gift】 This rubber duck bath toy set is great for many occasions, such as bath time, decorations, party favors, gag gifts, baby showers, pranks, cake toppers and carnival games.
description: Product description Instructions for Use : 1.Not for children under 3 years old. 2.The ducks are not edible. Please do NOT put into your mouth. 3.Your children can play with it in or out bathtub.After bathing,squeeze the water out of the duck and let it dry. 4.You just squeeze the duck to fill it with air and the duck will return to its normal state if ducks are deformed. Please do NOT put into your mouth. 3.Your children can play with it in or out bathtub.After bathing,squeeze the water out of the duck and let it dry. 4.You just squeeze the duck to fill it with air and the duck will return to its normal state if ducks are deformed.
